text: CNNs are specialized neural networks for grid-structured data (images, video). Key operations: convolution (slide filters over input, detect patterns), pooling (downsample, reduce parameters), fully connected layers (classification). AlexNet (2012) won ImageNet by 10%+ margin, launching the deep learning revolution.
Key architectures: VGG (deep, simple), ResNet (skip connections, enable 152+ layers), Inception (multi-scale), EfficientNet (neural architecture search).
